personal.name: Rui Jin
personal.title: Creative Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Crafting digital experiences with precision and creativity
personal.description: Specializing in modern web development and interactive design.

seo.siteDescription: Showcasing the work and skills of Rui Jin, a creative software engineer specializing in web development and performance optimization.

projects.title: Landing Page for SaaS Product
projects.description: Designed and developed a responsive landing page for a SaaS product, focusing on user experience and conversion optimization.
projects.longDescription: Created a visually appealing and highly functional landing page for a SaaS product, ensuring an optimal user experience and maximizing conversion rates.
features: Optimized for conversion with clear CTAs
Integration with Resend for seamless communication

projects.title: Shark Detection System using Drone
projects.description: An AI-powered system for detecting sharks using drone technology. Utilizes computer vision models to identify and track sharks in real-time.
projects.longDescription: Developed an AI-driven shark detection system that utilizes state-of-the-art computer vision models to identify and track sharks in real-time.

projects.title: Photo protection system for Instagram
projects.description: An AI-based system designed to protect photos on Instagram from unauthorized use. It uses image recognition and watermarking techniques.
projects.longDescription: Created an AI-based photo protection system for Instagram that utilizes image recognition and watermarking techniques to safeguard users' content from unauthorized use.
features: Image recognition for unauthorized use detection
User-friendly dashboard for managing protected content

projects.title: GitHub Scraping Tool
projects.description: A tool for scraping and analyzing GitHub data in real-time. Provides insights and actionable information through interactive dashboards.
projects.longDescription: Developed a real-time web application for scraping and analyzing GitHub data, providing insights and actionable information through interactive dashboards.
features: Integration with GitHub API for comprehensive data access

testimonials.name: Sementha Lee

testimonials.content: Working with Rui was a fantastic experience. He brought our vision to life with his technical expertise and innovative approach.

testimonials.name: Tilman Schmidt
testimonials.content: Rui's ability to solve complex problems and deliver results on time is truly impressive. He is a valuable asset to any team.

about: I'm a passionate developer who loves turning ideas into reality through code. With a keen eye for design and a strong technical foundation, I create experiences that are both beautiful and functional. My approach combines creativity with technical excellence, ensuring every project not only looks great but performs exceptionally.
